name: BLS — Bureau of Labor Statistics
description: Official US labor market data — non-farm payrolls, unemployment rate, CPI components, PPI, average hourly earnings, JOLTS, productivity, employment cost index, occupational employment. Primary source for the data FRED republishes; useful when you want the canonical print or finer granularity (CPI subindexes, specific occupational data). Free tier: 25 requests/day without key, 500/day with key. Register at https://www.bls.gov/developers/. API is POST-based with JSON body — series IDs are coded (LNS14000000 = unemployment rate, CUUR0000SA0 = CPI all-urban, CES0500000003 = avg hourly earnings).

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: BLS Registration Key
credential_fields.description: From https://data.bls.gov/registrationEngine/. Free; 500 req/day with key (vs 25/day without). Required for date-range queries beyond the latest year.

tools.name: get_series
tools.description: Fetch one or more BLS time series in a single call. Pass up to 50 series ids in `seriesid` and optional date range. Returns parallel data arrays with period (M01–M12 for months), year, value, and footnotes. Common series: LNS14000000 (unemployment rate), CUUR0000SA0 (CPI all-urban, all items), CES0500000003 (avg hourly earnings), JTS000000000000000JOL (job openings, total).

seriesid.description: BLS series ids — coded strings like LNS14000000.

startyear.description: YYYY, e.g. '2020'. Required for multi-year queries with a registered key.

catalog.description: Include series-level metadata (description, units, seasonal_adjustment) in the response.

calculations.description: Include net change + % change calculations alongside raw values.

annualaverage.description: Include the annual average row for each year.

registrationkey.description: Auto-populated from credentials.api_key — don't pass manually.

tools.name: get_series_single
tools.description: Latest year's data for ONE series, no body required — useful for quick lookups via the GET form of the API.

tools.name: popular_series
tools.description: List BLS's most-requested series, optionally filtered by survey. Use to discover what's actually trafficked vs the long tail. Surveys: CE (Employment), CU (CPI), JT (JOLTS), LN (Labor Force), PR (Productivity), etc.

survey.description: Two-letter survey code (CE, CU, JT, LN, PR, etc.). Omit for all popular series.

tools.name: list_surveys
tools.description: Every BLS survey + abbreviation. Use to discover the survey landscape before drilling into popular_series.

tools.name: survey_info
tools.description: Metadata for one survey — title, description, last-update info, units.
